chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 1681 of 2023 (Akhtiar Syed @ Bakhtiar versus The State) Date Order with signature of Judges For hearing of bail application 14.09.2023 M/s Zakir Hussain Boghio and Asif Korejo advocates for the applicant Mr. Ameer Ali Leghari, advocate for the Complainant Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP for the State ----------------------------------- The applicant by way of listed application has sought for his release on bail; his bail application before learned trial Court was dismissed as not pressed; it is not an order on merits to be examined by this Court, therefore, the instant bail application is dismissed directing the applicant that subject to law he may repeat his bail application before learned trial Court for its disposal on merits and then to approach this Court in event of its dismissal or otherwise, if need be. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
